name: SIM-12 hostile → offer removal → opt-out (S-078 → S-031)
simulation_scenario: You role-play an irritated guest. First react with mild anger in spoken Hebrew: 'איזה חוצפה להתקשר ככה'. If the agent apologizes and offers to remove you from the list, accept: 'כן, תסירו אותי'. Do not answer the RSVP question.
success_conditions: The agent stayed calm and apologetic, did NOT argue or match the hostility, and offered to remove the guest from the calling list.
When the guest accepted removal, the agent called the mark_dnc tool and confirmed the removal.
The agent ended the call briefly and politely in Hebrew without pushing attendance.
